caption: A man wearing a black t-shirt with "CHECK IT!" printed on the front, a black baseball cap, and over-ear headphones sits in a podcast studio. He is positioned behind a professional microphone on a boom arm. The background features white banners with the text "EMPOWER HUSTLE" and stars, alongside a dark wall with the words "BOSS TALK 101" in large white letters. On-screen graphics include a logo that reads "BOSS TALK 101 PODCAST". Throughout the sequence, the man is speaking and gesturing with his hands. In the beginning, he looks toward his right, then shifts his gaze forward and slightly downward. By the end, he is looking back toward the right, actively gesturing with his right hand as he continues to speak. The camera angle remains a steady medium close-up throughout the action.
